violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front of store, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2025
The outside dumpster area was observed with an accumulation of debris. Refuse area must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

The door to the outside, entry way, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the food cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023
The outside refuse area was observed with an accumulation of litter. Outside refuse areas must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2023
The sales floors have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2023
